seoTitle: Tamala Park vs Tammin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tamala Park and Tammin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tamala Park vs Tammin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tamala Park and Tammin.
heading: Tamala Park vs Tammin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tamala Park, Western Australia and Tammin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tammin has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Tamala Park (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tamala Park or Tammin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tamala Park has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Tammin scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tamala Park scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Tammin scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tamala Park or Tammin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tammin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
